TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Kavalan, story: KavNr-pear_buya
TEXT.citation: Sung, L. M., Lily, I., Hsieh, F., & Lin, Z. (2008). Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages. Taiwan Journal of Linguistics, 6(2.).
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @article{sung2008developing,title={Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages.},author={Sung, Li-May and Lily, I and Hsieh, Fuhui and Lin, Zhemin and others},journal={Taiwan Journal of Linguistics},volume={6},number={2},year={2008}}

S.FORM: yau baqiAN 'nay usiq matiw ta nipalumaanna tu sinsuli.
S.PHON: jau βaqian ʔnaj usiq matiw ta niparumaanna tu sinsuri.
S.FORM: yau baqiAN 'nay usiq matiw ta nipalumaanna tu sinsuli.
S.PHON: jau βaqian ʔnaj usiq matiw ta niparumaanna tu sinsuri.
S.TRANSL: 有一個老人去他種李子的果園.
There was an old man who went to the orchard where he grew plums.

S.FORM: titaanna muaza sinsulina nengiti alaan zinna nani.
S.PHON: titaanna muaz~ra sinsurina nəŋiti araan z~rinna nani.
S.FORM: titaanna muaza sinsulina nengiti alaan zinna nani.
S.PHON: titaanna muaz~ra sinsurina nəŋiti araan z~rinna nani.
S.TRANSL: 看到很多李子可以摘了.

TRANSL.notes: (He) saw many plums that were ready to be plucked.

S.TRANSL: saw many plums that were ready to be plucked.

S.PHON: kjaraannati sinsurina.
kjaraannati sinsurina.
pipitanna nani.
pipitanna nani.
piz~rjaanna taqanasanna.
piz~rjaanna taqanasanna.
uturuti qanas ʔnaj.
uturuti qanas ʔnaj.

S.FORM: utulu qanas 'nay nani uzusa pungiRti niizananna nani nipipitanna tu sinsuli.
S.PHON: uturu qanas ʔnaj nani uz~rusa puŋiʁti niiz~rananna nani nipipitanna tu sinsuri.
S.FORM: utulu qanas 'nay nani uzusa pungiRti niizananna nani nipipitanna tu sinsuli.
S.PHON: uturu qanas ʔnaj nani uz~rusa puŋiʁti niiz~rananna nani nipipitanna tu sinsuri.
S.TRANSL: 那三個籃子,有兩個裝滿摘的李子.
Two of the three baskets were full the plums he plucked

S.FORM: nani tangi yau 'nay usiq lazat 'nay kmawit tu sizi mlazyu takinilanna.
S.PHON: nani taŋi jau ʔnaj usiq raz~rat ʔnaj kmawit tu siz~ri mraz~rju takiniranna.
S.FORM: nani tangi yau 'nay usiq lazat 'nay kmawit tu sizi mlazyu takinilanna.
S.PHON: nani taŋi jau ʔnaj usiq raz~rat ʔnaj kmawit tu siz~ri mraz~rju takiniranna.
S.TRANSL: 過了一會兒,有一個牽著一隻羊的人經過他的旁邊.
A while later, there was a man who pulled along a goat passing him by.

S.FORM: nani Raylikuzna uman nani yauti sunis 'nay QAzitinsya maseq titaanna.
S.PHON: nani ʁajrikuz~rna uman nani jauti sunis ʔnaj qaz~ritinsja masəq titaanna.
S.FORM: nani Raylikuzna uman nani yauti sunis 'nay QAzitinsya maseq titaanna.
S.PHON: nani ʁajrikuz~rna uman nani jauti sunis ʔnaj qaz~ritinsja masəq titaanna.

TRANSL.notes: 後面又有一個孩子騎腳踏車到達(那邊).

S.TRANSL: 後面又有一個孩子騎腳踏車到達 .
A child rode a bicycle in the backside and arrived there.

S.FORM: baqian 'nay yau ta babaw na paRin na sinsuli nani.
S.PHON: βaqian ʔnaj jau ta βaβaw na paʁin na sinsuri nani.
S.FORM: baqian 'nay yau ta babaw na paRin na sinsuli nani.
S.PHON: βaqian ʔnaj jau ta βaβaw na paʁin na sinsuri nani.

TRANSL.notes: (他)看到那個老人在李子樹上.

S.TRANSL: 看到那個老人在李子樹上.

TRANSL.notes: (He) saw the old man is up on the plum tree.

S.TRANSL: saw the old man is up on the plum tree.

S.PHON: az~ruti sa supa supaʁanna.
az~ruti sa supa supaʁanna.

S.FORM: nani tmitana baqian 'nay mai mai ma titaanna baqian 'nay sayza nani.
S.PHON: nani tmitana βaqian ʔnaj mai mai ma titaanna βaqian ʔnaj sajz~ra nani.
S.FORM: nani tmitana baqian 'nay mai mai ma titaanna baqian 'nay sayza nani.
S.PHON: nani tmitana βaqian ʔnaj mai mai ma titaanna βaqian ʔnaj sajz~ra nani.
S.TRANSL: The old man was not paying attention.

S.PHON: araanna sunis ʔnaj usiq ʔnaj qanas ʔnaj sinsuri ʔnaj.
araanna sunis ʔnaj usiq ʔnaj qanas ʔnaj sinsuri ʔnaj.
S.TRANSL: The child took a basket of plum.

S.PHON: qajʁuz~riqanna səpawanna taz~ritinsjaanna nani.
qajʁuz~riqanna səpawanna taz~ritinsjaanna nani.
S.TRANSL: 把偷來的籃子放在腳踏車.
and put the basket he stole on the bicycle

S.PHON: wijati smaqaj.
wijati smaqaj.

S.FORM: simqatapung tu usiqay 'nay QAzitinsya tazungan nani.
S.PHON: simqatapuŋ tu usiqaj ʔnaj qaz~ritinsja taz~ruŋan nani.
S.FORM: simqatapung tu usiqay 'nay QAzitinsya tazungan nani.
S.PHON: simqatapuŋ tu usiqaj ʔnaj qaz~ritinsja taz~ruŋan nani.

TRANSL.notes: (他) 遇到一個騎腳踏車的女孩.

S.TRANSL: 遇到一個騎腳踏車的女孩.

TRANSL.notes: (He) met a girl who rode a bicycle.

S.TRANSL: met a girl who rode a bicycle.

S.PHON: manβasəʁ ʔnaj quβuna ja.
manβasəʁ ʔnaj quβuna ja.

S.FORM: nani tita paiku tu qubuku zinna sayza nani.
S.PHON: nani tita paiku tu quβuku z~rinna sajz~ra nani.
S.FORM: nani tita paiku tu qubuku zinna sayza nani.
S.PHON: nani tita paiku tu quβuku z~rinna sajz~ra nani.
S.TRANSL: "I am going to see my hat." he said.

S.PHON: taŋi ita.
taŋi ita.

S.FORM: Raynguanna tangayawan yau betu 'nay usiq nani zuquRanna betu 'nay msuRawti.
S.PHON: ʁajŋuanna taŋajawan jau βətu ʔnaj usiq nani z~ruquʁanna βətu ʔnaj msuʁawti.
S.FORM: Raynguanna tangayawan yau betu 'nay usiq nani zuquRanna betu 'nay msuRawti.
S.PHON: ʁajŋuanna taŋajawan jau βətu ʔnaj usiq nani z~ruquʁanna βətu ʔnaj msuʁawti.

TRANSL.notes: (他)不知道前面有一顆石頭,撞到那顆石頭跌倒了.

S.TRANSL: 不知道前面有一顆石頭,撞到那顆石頭跌倒了.

TRANSL.notes: (He) did not know that there was a stone ahead, bumped into the stone and fell.

S.TRANSL: did not know that there was a stone ahead, bumped into the stone and fell.

S.PHON: suʁaw nani.
suʁaw nani.

S.FORM: bibyaqti 'nay ti mtabukti na pa na iza nay sinsulina nani.
S.PHON: βiβjaqti ʔnaj ti mtaβukti na pa na iz~ra naj sinsurina nani.
S.FORM: bibyaqti 'nay ti mtabukti na pa na iza nay sinsulina nani.
S.PHON: βiβjaqti ʔnaj ti mtaβukti na pa na iz~ra naj sinsurina nani.

S.FORM: titaanna kini yau kinita kintulu nani sunis 'nay kintuluay tmita nani titaanna msuRaw sa sunis 'nay.
S.PHON: titaanna kini jau kinita kinturu nani sunis ʔnaj kinturuaj tmita nani titaanna msuʁaw sa sunis ʔnaj.
S.FORM: titaanna kini yau kinita kintulu nani sunis 'nay kintuluay tmita nani titaanna msuRaw sa sunis 'nay.
S.PHON: titaanna kini jau kinita kinturu nani sunis ʔnaj kinturuaj tmita nani titaanna msuʁaw sa sunis ʔnaj.
S.TRANSL: 那三個小孩看見那個小孩跌倒了.
The three children saw the child fell.

S.PHON: paŋmuannati miz~ra tusinsurina.
paŋmuannati miz~ra tusinsurina.

S.FORM: misis mayzipana tu eh m tu.
S.PHON: misis majz~ripana tu əh m tu.
S.FORM: misis mayzipana tu eh m tu.
S.PHON: misis majz~ripana tu əh m tu.
S.TRANSL: 把他和他的腳踏車扶起來.
helped him and his bicycle up.

S.PHON: z~ritinsjana nani kawitannati wijati.
z~ritinsjana nani kawitannati wijati.

TRANSL.notes: (他) 牽著(他的腳踏車)走了.

S.PHON: kawitannati z~ritinsjana.
kawitannati z~ritinsjana.
nani pirpirʁəsti smaqaj itaŋ əh.
nani pirpirʁəsti smaqaj itaŋ əh.

S.FORM: mRaRiuti wiyati 'nay kaputna kintulu 'nay nani titaanna ta tuRuz yau qubuna.
S.PHON: mʁaʁiuti wijati ʔnaj kaputna kinturu ʔnaj nani titaanna ta tuʁuz~r jau quβuna.
S.FORM: mRaRiuti wiyati 'nay kaputna kintulu 'nay nani titaanna ta tuRuz yau qubuna.
S.PHON: mʁaʁiuti wijati ʔnaj kaputna kinturu ʔnaj nani titaanna ta tuʁuz~r jau quβuna.

TRANSL.notes: (They) saw that there is a hat in behind.

S.TRANSL: saw that there is a hat in behind.

S.FORM: qeRasanna qubusu zau zinna en zinna.
S.PHON: qəʁasanna quβusu z~rau z~rinna ən z~rinna.
S.FORM: qeRasanna qubusu zau zinna en zinna.
S.PHON: qəʁasanna quβusu z~rau z~rinna ən z~rinna.

TRANSL.notes: (他們)叫 「這是你的帽子嗎?」「嗯」他說.

S.TRANSL: 叫 「這是你的帽子嗎?」「嗯」他說.

TRANSL.notes: (They) yelled, " Is this your hat?" "Hmm," he said.

S.TRANSL: yelled, " Is this your hat?" "Hmm," he said.

S.PHON: tariquranna siquβuannati nani.
tariquranna siquβuannati nani.
S.TRANSL: He looked back and wore the hat.

S.FORM: mala tu utulu 'nay sinsuli sinapunannati kintulu alaanna nani.
S.PHON: mara tu uturu ʔnaj sinsuri sinapunannati kinturu araanna nani.
S.FORM: mala tu utulu 'nay sinsuli sinapunannati kintulu alaanna nani.
S.PHON: mara tu uturu ʔnaj sinsuri sinapunannati kinturu araanna nani.
S.TRANSL: 拿三個李子,分給三個小孩.

TRANSL.notes: (He) took three plums, and distributed them to the three child.

S.TRANSL: took three plums, and distributed them to the three child.

S.PHON: wijati qanijau mananna nani.
wijati qanijau mananna nani.

S.FORM: ey kintulu 'nay sunis 'nay mlazyu tu baqian 'nay.
S.PHON: əj kinturu ʔnaj sunis ʔnaj mraz~rju tu βaqian ʔnaj.
S.FORM: ey kintulu 'nay sunis 'nay mlazyu tu baqian 'nay.
S.PHON: əj kinturu ʔnaj sunis ʔnaj mraz~rju tu βaqian ʔnaj.
S.TRANSL: 那三個小孩經過那個老人.
The three children passed the old man.

S.FORM: tu sinsuli 'nay tu paRin 'nay nani titaanna baqian 'nay.
S.PHON: tu sinsuri ʔnaj tu paʁin ʔnaj nani titaanna βaqian ʔnaj.
S.FORM: tu sinsuli 'nay tu paRin 'nay nani titaanna baqian 'nay.
S.PHON: tu sinsuri ʔnaj tu paʁin ʔnaj nani titaanna βaqian ʔnaj.

S.FORM: mana sinsuliku uzusati taqanasan nani mana usiqti ma zinna.
S.PHON: mana sinsuriku uz~rusati taqanasan nani mana usiqti ma z~rinna.
S.FORM: mana sinsuliku uzusati taqanasan nani mana usiqti ma zinna.
S.PHON: mana sinsuriku uz~rusati taqanasan nani mana usiqti ma z~rinna.
S.TRANSL: 「為什麼我的兩籃李子只剩一籃?」,他說.
"Why the two baskets of plums of mine becomes one basket?" He said.

S.PHON: titaanna sunisʔnaj mraz~rju.
titaanna sunisʔnaj mraz~rju.
S.TRANSL: He saw the children passing by.

S.PHON: mai tu niimətan.
mai tu niimətan.
paməŋti mŋaŋaʁ tja tmita.
paməŋti mŋaŋaʁ tja tmita.

S.FORM: nani mana pamengti mai uturu pasani semani.
S.PHON: nani mana paməŋti mai uturu pasani səmani.
S.FORM: nani mana pamengti mai uturu pasani semani.
S.PHON: nani mana paməŋti mai uturu pasani səmani.
S.TRANSL: 為什麼沒有? 跑哪裡去了?

S.PHON: maiti ʔnaj usiq ʔnaj.
maiti ʔnaj usiq ʔnaj.
S.TRANSL: 「我的那一籃李子不見了.」他說.
"That basket of plums of mine is gone." He said.

S.FORM: ta Pqanasan 'nay sinsuliku zinna baqian 'nay pamengti mngangaR tya.
S.PHON: ta pqanasan ʔnaj sinsuriku z~rinna βaqian ʔnaj paməŋti mŋaŋaʁ tja.
S.FORM: ta Pqanasan 'nay sinsuliku zinna baqian 'nay pamengti mngangaR tya.
S.PHON: ta pqanasan ʔnaj sinsuriku z~rinna βaqian ʔnaj paməŋti mŋaŋaʁ tja.
S.TRANSL: 老人想為什麼,張著嘴發呆看.
That old man wonders, while he slack-jawed and looked.

S.PHON: qmusqus tu uʁu.
qmusqus tu uʁu.

S.FORM: naquni smani nikasyanemanna ne maiti pasaniti 'nay sinsuliku zinna sayzaanna baqian 'nay.
S.PHON: naquni smani nikasjanəmanna nə maiti pasaniti ʔnaj sinsuriku z~rinna sajz~raanna βaqian ʔnaj.
S.FORM: naquni smani nikasyanemanna ne maiti pasaniti 'nay sinsuliku zinna sayzaanna baqian 'nay.
S.PHON: naquni smani nikasjanəmanna nə maiti pasaniti ʔnaj sinsuriku z~rinna sajz~raanna βaqian ʔnaj.
S.TRANSL: 「不見了…我的李子跑到哪裡去了? 」那個老人說.
"Where did my plums go?" The old man said.

S.PHON: paməŋti ja.
paməŋti ja.

S.FORM: zi sa ya qay suqiqirnilti uRuna tayan.
S.PHON: z~ri sa ja qaj suqiqirnirti uʁuna tajan.
S.FORM: zi sa ya qay suqiqirnilti uRuna tayan.
S.PHON: z~ri sa ja qaj suqiqirnirti uʁuna tajan.
najawma ka ʔnaj titaanku taŋi.
najawma ka ʔnaj titaanku taŋi.
